Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mild hyperchloremia. Albumin is slightly high, while globulin is low, which may indicate altered protein balance. Triglycerides are mildly elevated. Other parameters, including glucose, electrolytes, liver enzymes, and cholesterol, are within normal limits. Renal function and protein abnormalities warrant further clinical correlation and monitoring.
